summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a consistently strong 1992 summer tour show that rocks from the first note.
review: Reviewers rave about this June 17, 1992 performance as one of the most consistent and intentional shows of the year, noting its deliberate setlist and nonstop energy. The board recording is praised as “really really good,” delivering clear, enjoyable sound throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Both detailed reviews give 5‑star praise for the musical performance and note very high board quality; limited number of substantive reviews keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers specifically mention that the boards from these ’92 shows are “really really good,” implying clear, well‑balanced audio with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a deliberate, intentional setlist that rocks from the very beginning; considered the most consistent ’92 show heard so far.
